name: Tulong Panghanapbuhay sa Ating Disadvantaged/Displaced Workers (TUPAD)
description: Emergency employment program providing short-term work for displaced or seasonal workers
office: DOLE Provincial Office or Field Office
next_steps: Check for active TUPAD programs in your LGU via DOLE regional website
Register at your Barangay Hall or PESO (Public Employment Service Office)
Submit documentary requirements to DOLE Field Office
Participate in skills assessment if required
